phrases.intent_en: Ask where the hidden viewpoint is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿sabe dónde hay un mirador escondido?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-pe, SA-be DON-de I un mee-ra-DOR es-kon-DEE-do?

likely_response.local: Cerca del Alcázar, baje por esa calle.
likely_response.pronunciation: THEHR-kah DEHL AHLKÁ-thahr BAH-heh POHR EH-sah KAHL-leh
likely_response.translation_en: Near the Alcázar, go down that street.

responses.english: Near the Alcázar, go down that street.
responses.phonetic: THEHR-kah DEHL AHLKÁ-thahr BAH-heh POHR EH-sah KAHL-leh
responses.local: Cerca del Alcázar, baje por esa calle.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the damascene workshop is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el taller de damasquinado?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-as, DON-deh es-TAH el tah-YEHR deh dah-mahs-kee-NAH-doh?

likely_response.local: Siga recto tras el Mirador del Valle.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah REHTH-toh TRAHS EHL mee-rah-DOHR DEHL BAHL-leh
likely_response.translation_en: Alfonso XII Street, going up towards the cathedral.

responses.english: Alfonso XII Street, going up towards the cathedral.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah REHTH-toh TRAHS EHL mee-rah-DOHR DEHL BAHL-leh
responses.local: Siga recto tras el Mirador del Valle.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the artisan workshops cluster is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el barrio de artesanos?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-des eh-STAH el bar-REE-oh deh ar-teh-SAH-nohs?

likely_response.local: Callejón de las Animas, zona de talleres antiguos.
likely_response.pronunciation: kahl-leh-HÓN DEH LAHS ah-NEE-mahs THOH-nah DEH tahl-LEH-rehs ahn-tee-G-ohs
likely_response.translation_en: Animas Alley, zone of old workshops.

responses.english: Animas Alley, zone of old workshops.
responses.phonetic: kahl-leh-HÓN DEH LAHS ah-NEE-mahs THOH-nah DEH tahl-LEH-rehs ahn-tee-G-ohs
responses.local: Callejón de las Animas, zona de talleres antiguos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find authentic restaurants away from tourist areas
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde hay restaurantes auténticos lejos de las zonas turísticas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eye res-tow-RAHN-tehs ow-TEN-tee-kohs LEH-hohs deh lahs SOH-nahs too-REE-stee-kahs?

likely_response.local: En la zona residencial norte del casco.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH THOH-nah reh-see-dehn-thee-AHL NOHR-teh DEHL KAH-skoh
likely_response.translation_en: In the residential north zone of the center.

responses.english: In the residential north zone of the center.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH THOH-nah reh-see-dehn-thee-AHL NOHR-teh DEHL KAH-skoh
responses.local: En la zona residencial norte del casco.
